tree.setup: You and your friend Xiao Hua are at the cinema, trying to decide which movie to watch.
tree.setup_zh: 你和朋友小华在电影院，正在纠结看哪部电影。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 有一部新的动画片，听说很好看。还有一部爱情片。你想看哪个？
turns.text_pinyin: Yǒu yī bù xīn de dònghuà piàn, tīngshuō hěn hǎokàn. Hái yǒu yī bù àiqíng piàn. Nǐ xiǎng kàn nǎge?
turns.text_en: There's a new animated film that's supposed to be great. And a romance. Which one do you want?

options.text_zh: 我投动画片！好的动画片大人看也很感动。而且我们可以放松一下，不用想太多。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ tóu dònghuà piàn! Hǎo de dònghuà piàn dàrén kàn yě hěn gǎndòng. Érqiě wǒmen kěyǐ fàngsōng yīxià, bú yòng xiǎng tài duō.
options.text_en: I vote animated! Good animation is moving even for adults. Plus we can relax without thinking too much.

options.text_pinyin: Wǒ qíshí bú tài xiǎng kàn diànyǐng.
options.text_en: I don't really want to watch a movie.
options.feedback: Why are you at the cinema then?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好！动画片就动画片。我去买爆米花和饮料，你去占座位。要甜的还是咸的爆米花？
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎo! Dònghuà piàn jiù dònghuà piàn. Wǒ qù mǎi bàomǐhuā hé yǐnliào, nǐ qù zhàn zuòwèi. Yào tián de háishi xián de bàomǐhuā?
turns.text_en: Okay! Animated it is. I'll get popcorn and drinks, you grab seats. Sweet or salty popcorn?

options.text_zh: 甜的！然后再来一杯可乐。我先去找好座位，中间的位子看电影最舒服。
options.text_pinyin: Tián de! Ránhòu zài lái yī bēi kělè. Wǒ xiān qù zhǎo hǎo zuòwèi, zhōngjiān de wèizi kàn diànyǐng zuì shūfu.
options.text_en: Sweet! And a cola. I'll find good seats — the middle ones are best for watching.

options.feedback: Fine but doesn't add to the fun.

tree.cultural_note: Going to the cinema is one of the most popular friend activities in Chinese cities. The sweet vs. salty popcorn debate is a universal conversation starter. Animated films are increasingly appreciated by adult audiences in China.
